attributes.net.peer.name: localhost
attributes.db.name: taskflow
attributes.db.statement:
SELECT tasks.id, tasks.project_id, tasks.title, tasks.description, tasks.status, tasks.priority, tasks.assignee_id, tasks.due_date, tasks.created_at, tasks.updated_at 
FROM tasks 
WHERE tasks.project_id = $1::UUID ORDER BY tasks.created_at DESC /*db_driver='asyncpg',db_framework='sqlalchemy%%3A2.0.51',traceparent='00-2bdea1a1c643f472e9d3f9efdabc65a6-8121803e776f610b-03'*/

attributes.net.peer.name: localhost
attributes.db.name: taskflow
attributes.db.statement:
SELECT comments.task_id AS comments_task_id, comments.id AS comments_id, comments.author_id AS comments_author_id, comments.content AS comments_content, comments.created_at AS comments_created_at 
FROM comments 
WHERE comments.task_id IN ($1::UUID) ORDER BY comments.created_at /*db_driver='asyncpg',db_framework='sqlalchemy%%3A2.0.51',traceparent='00-2bdea1a1c643f472e9d3f9efdabc65a6-ae62c0a7be694410-03'*/

attributes.db.statement: INSERT INTO tasks (id, project_id, title, description, status, priority, assignee_id, due_date) VALUES ($1::UUID, $2::UUID, $3::VARCHAR, $4::VARCHAR, $5::task_status, $6::INTEGER, $7::UUID, $8::TIMESTAMP WITH TIME ZONE) RETURNING tasks.created_at, tasks.updated_at /*db_driver='asyncpg',db_framework='sqlalchemy%%3A2.0.51',traceparent='00-343b7d3a467877e6393185e0d77954eb-8200677753e83243-03'*/
